response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned polyglot engineer with strong full-stack fundamentals and credible stints at Stripe and Shopify, but the resume contains no evidence of the domain expertise central to this role: experimentation platforms, feature flagging, rollout automation, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical methods for bias detection and growth measurement. The position targets a Principal/IC6 who can architect and own cross-team experimentation systems at enterprise scale — a highly specialized discipline requiring dedicated platform-building experience that Bogdan has not demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across a wide range of languages and stacks (TypeScript, C, C++, Java, D), satisfying the language breadth requirement
Staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify with meaningful scale exposure (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic; direct mail platform serving millions of sends at Shopify)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at Stripe aligns with the role's emphasis on AI-first engineering velocity and developer tooling
concerns: No experimentation platform experience — zero mention of A/B testing infrastructure, feature flags, experiment assignment/targeting, rollout automation, or statistical bias detection

No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background — the role's core deliverables (instrumentation foundations, unified growth measurement, cross-surface funnel analytics) are entirely absent from the resume
Currently Staff IC, not Principal/IC6 — the role demands multi-workstream architectural ownership and cross-org initiative leadership at a scope not evidenced in the candidate's history

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics platform experience
Strong polyglot engineering fundamentals with production scale
